# Fixture del paquete (conserva datos; no reescribas asserts)
import numpy as np

def resumen(x):
    x = np.asarray(x, dtype=float)
    return {
        "n": int(x.size),
        "mean": round(float(x.mean()), 4),
        "median": round(float(np.median(x)), 4),
        "std": round(float(x.std(ddof=1)), 4),
    }
print(resumen([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]))

exercises.code:
import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float)
x = z.copy()
y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx = np.polyfit(z, x, 1)
by = np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1])
ry = y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
# residuales ~0 → corr inestable; reporta max abs residual
r_res = float(np.corrcoef(rx, ry)[0, 1]) if float(np.std(rx)) > 0 and float(np.std(ry)) > 0 else 0.0
print(round(r_raw, 4), round(r_res if r_res == r_res else 0.0, 4))
# D2-Skeptic: packet-only re-walk S18 S18-T3-A-E3

df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, 0.0, 3.0]})
n_raw = len(df)

note = {"n_raw": n_raw, "n_final": len(df2), "seed": 42}
print(note)
